title: Add reboot simulation test for SSN restore after NVM read failure
description: Add test that simulates NVM read failure on context creation (mock read returns -1). Verify fallback to SSN=0, check_freshness behavior, and that oscore_protect_request does not reuse nonces. Extend lichen/tests/oscore/src/main.c and verify with ztest.
close_reason: Added reboot simulation test for NVM read failure in oscore test. Verifies SSN=0 fallback, check_freshness=OK, protect_request requires explicit set_sender_seq(0) to prevent nonce reuse. Test passes ztest.
